title: Xtra Creamy Croatian Cheese Pasta
description: A light and creamy Croatian dish featuring olive oil and a yeasty cheese pull, this vegetarian friendly pasta is perfect for a weeknight dinner. The al-dente finish and flavorful sauce make it a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pappardelle pasta according to package instructions until al-dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
In a large bowl, whisk together the vegetable broth, heavy cream, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Add the shredded Croatian cheese to the bowl and stir until well combined and the cheese is fully melted.
Add the cooked pasta to the cheese sauce and stir until the pasta is well coated.
Transfer the pasta to the skillet with the onion and garlic and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the pasta for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened and the cheese is pulling.
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
Let the pasta rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the sauce to set.
Enjoy your delicious and creamy Croatian cheese pasta.
